channel.title: Company News Monitor - Big Tech
channel.description: Generated big tech company news feed.

item.title: NVIDIA Vera Rubin Maximizes Intelligence per Dollar for Post-Training Workloads — a Key Metric for Agentic AI
item.description: Lowest cost per token from extreme codesign maximizes intelligence per dollar for post-training in the agentic era.

item.title: Designing emoji for the way we communicate today
item.description: On World Emoji Day, go behind the scenes of Noto 3D to learn how we redesigned thousands of emoji for modern communication.

item.title: Amazon will share its Q2 2026 earnings on July 30
item.description: On July 30, Amazon is set to hold a conference call to discuss its Q2 2026 financial results.

item.title: Datadog Announces Date of Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Call
item.description: NEW YORK, July 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced that it will report its second quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results before the U.S. financial markets open on Thursday, August 6, 2026.

item.title: Amazon.com to Webcast Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call
item.description: SEATTLE--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) announced today that it will hold a conference call to discuss its second quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, July 30, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. PT/5:00 p.m. ET.

item.title: Experience the legacy of Estadio Azteca on Google Earth.
item.description: Relive 60 years of soccer history at Mexico City’s Aztec Stadium with Google Earth and the ICA Foundation.

item.title: Beach vibes and temporary wallpaper are trending for back-to-school season.
item.description: College students are eager to turn their dull dorm rooms into cozy spaces. Here are the Google Search trends we’re seeing.

item.title: 6 back-to-school shopping tricks every student should know
item.description: Whether you're decorating, refreshing your wardrobe or picking up last-minute essentials, these shopping tools make all the difference.

item.title: 10 things to know about AWS’s new compute leader Dave Treadwell
item.description: Now the Senior Vice President of Compute and Machine Learning Services, Treadwell joined Amazon almost by accident and was one of the coders behind early Windows.

item.title: Reimagining higher education with the Waterloo Futures Lab
item.description: Google and the University of Waterloo’s Futures Lab is helping students build real-world AI tools and prepare for jobs of tomorrow.

item.title: NotebookLM is now Gemini Notebook
item.description: Google Blog published an update for Google relevant to big tech news. Open the original item for full details.

item.title: Connect more of your apps to Search
item.description: You’ll be able to securely link and interact with your go-to services directly in AI Mode.

item.title: Create, edit and star in videos with two Google Vids updates
item.description: Gemini Omni and personal avatars in Google Vids make video creation easier than ever.

item.title: We’re partnering with the Georgia Public Library Service for no-cost career and AI training.
item.description: Google partners with the Georgia Public Library Service to provide free Career Certificates and AI training to residents statewide.

item.title: Sharpen the Sword, Skip the Downloads — ‘Onimusha: Way of the Sword’ Is Coming to GeForce NOW
item.description: Onimusha: Way of the Sword is coming to GeForce NOW at launch, with the playable demo available this week. It’s joined by Denshattack! rolling in with five new games arriving in the cloud. Plus, GeForce NOW officially launches in India, moving from beta to public availability — meaning gamers can sign up without a wait

item.title: The DMA should not undercut security & privacy for Europeans
item.description: Today's decisions risk undermining vital privacy and security guardrails for millions of Europeans. We have repeatedly offered solutions to safeguard users while satisfy…

item.title: TSMC Reports Second Quarter EPS of NT$27.25|Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
item.description: TSMC Latest News published an update for TSMC relevant to big tech news. Open the original item for full details.

item.title: Japan Government, Industrial Leaders and NVIDIA Launch the World’s First National AI Infrastructure
item.description: NVIDIA today announced it is working with Noetra Corp. to launch an NVIDIA Vera Rubin AI factory with 13,750 NVIDIA Vera CPUs and 27,500 NVIDIA Rubin GPUs for national physical AI.

item.title: We’re partnering with Screwfix to help the nation's tradespeople nail admin and grow their businesses using AI.
item.description: Google and Screwfix have teamed up to help the nation’s tradespeople use AI tools to grow their businesses.

item.title: Japan’s Robotics and Manufacturing Leaders Build on NVIDIA Cosmos to Advance Physical AI Frontier
item.description: NVIDIA today announced that Japan’s physical AI leaders are building on the NVIDIA Cosmos™, NVIDIA Isaac™, NVIDIA Metropolis and NVIDIA Jetson™ platforms to accelerate the deployment of intelligent machines across manufacturing, mobility, infrastructure and robotics.

item.title: NVIDIA Introduces New Jetson Thor Computers to Advance Mainstream Robotics and Edge AI
item.description: General-purpose robots and autonomous machines are moving from research labs to real-world mass-market deployment, creating demand for compact, power-efficient AI supercomputers capable of running foundation models at the edge. To meet that need, NVIDIA today introduced the T3000 and T2000, new modules based on the NVI

item.title: Japan’s Enterprises and Startups Build Industry-Specialized AI With NVIDIA Nemotron Open Models
item.description: NVIDIA today announced that leading Japanese enterprises, startups and research institutions are building industry-specialized AI models and applications with NVIDIA Nemotron™ open models, data and libraries, accelerating the development of AI tailored to Japan’s language, industries and workforce.

item.title: Datadog Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ For Observability Platforms For Sixth Consecutive Year
item.description: Positioned highest for Ability to Execute among all vendors evaluated NEW YORK, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced it has been named a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Observability

item.title: Dave Treadwell to lead AWS Compute and ML Services as Dave Brown departs
item.description: Treadwell brings nearly a decade of experience running Amazon’s technology platform to his new role.

item.title: Watch the trailer for 'I Play Rocky,' the true story behind ‘Rocky,’ coming to theaters November 2026
item.description: Anthony Ippolito stars as a young Sylvester Stallone in the Amazon MGM Studios film, directed by Academy Award winner Peter Farrelly.

item.title: NVIDIA and Japan Bring Full-Stack AI and Robotics to Every Industry
item.description: Home to leading manufacturers, robotics pioneers and infrastructure builders, Japan is one of the world’s centers of AI — building across the full stack with NVIDIA technologies. NVIDIA and its partners in Japan are this week showcasing the AI ecosystem’s latest advancements. Check back here for updates. NVIDIA and SEG

item.title: Amazon Leo to power satellite internet for South Africa’s largest internet provider
item.description: South Africa's largest fixed internet service provider, Herotel, will use Amazon's satellite network to connect homes and small businesses beyond the reach of fiber and fixed wireless.

item.title: It's not too late to get Pixel Care+ for your Pixel 9 or 10.
item.description: From July 13 to August 2, sign up for Pixel Care+ to get accidental damage coverage and $0 battery and screen repairs.

item.title: Explore The Met in new ways with generative AI
item.description: The Metropolitan Museum of Art unveils two new generative AI initiatives with Google Arts & Culture.

item.title: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
item.description: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.

item.title: Our largest solar and battery storage project ever
item.description: Google will both invest in and purchase energy and storage from Steel River Energy Center in Mississippi County, Arkansas.

item.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
item.description: Google Images is turning 25. Here’s a look back at some major milestones — and new ways to explore and create visual content.

item.title: Why Performance per Watt Is the Ultimate Metric for AI Infrastructure Efficiency
item.description: Power is AI infrastructure’s inescapable constraint. How many tokens an AI factory can generate within a fixed power budget determines its revenue and profitability. Because of this, performance per watt — a metric that can’t be gamed, only earned through real-world results — is the foundation for AI factories. As agen

item.title: Watch the trailer for 'Novak Djokovic: The Wolf in Winter,' Prime Video's new documentary coming August 20
item.description: The new Prime Video feature-length documentary goes behind the scenes with Novak Djokovic, the most accomplished men's tennis player in history.

item.title: 'The Oprah Podcast' is coming to Prime Video on July 21, with new episodes twice weekly
item.description: New episodes featuring today's thought leaders and cultural changemakers will air twice weekly on Prime Video.

item.title: Reconstructing Pelé’s “lost” goal
item.description: See how Google DeepMind AI technology reconstructed Pelé’s legendary 1959 lost goal at Rua Javari in our new mini-documentary.

item.title: We’re expanding Gemini in Chrome to users in the U.K.
item.description: Google is rolling out many of Chrome's latest AI features in the UK, starting today.

item.title: How Gemini is speaking the language of Southeast Asia
item.description: Gemini is taking off across Southeast Asia, thanks to its local language fluency and the region’s mobile-first population.

item.title: A first look at Mike Flanagan's ‘Carrie,’ a Stephen King adaptation coming to Prime Video this fall
item.description: Showrunner Mike Flanagan's bold reinvention of Stephen King's classic novel arrives on Prime Video this fall.

item.title: 3 easy ways Amazon customers can help bring safe water to millions with Get Blue
item.description: With the launch of Get Blue, Amazon customers can turn everyday moments into safe water access—just ask Alexa+, stream a playlist, or shop the new storefront.

item.title: TSMC June 2026 Revenue Report|Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited
item.description: TSMC Latest News published an update for TSMC relevant to big tech news. Open the original item for full details.

item.title: Amazon Business Prime refuerza la gestión inteligente del gasto empresarial aplicando IA a sus funcionalidades
item.description: Las herramientas Visibilidad del Gasto y Monitorización de Gastos Irregulares ayudan a los responsables de compras a detectar anomalías y tomar mejores decisiones, ahora enriquecidas con IA.

item.title: Amazon data center communities: Here’s what’s happening near data centers across the US
item.description: Get the latest updates on how Amazon supports small businesses, creates jobs, sets up sustainability initiatives, and develops educational programs near AWS data centers.

item.title: GeForce NOW Turns Up the Heat With New GeForce RTX 5080-Powered Toronto Server
item.description: This GFN Thursday brings more games, more power and more ways to play on GeForce NOW. The cloud gaming service is expanding with a new GeForce RTX 5080-powered server in Toronto, bringing dedicated high performance in the cloud closer to members across the region. NTE: Neverness to Everness also gets an update in the c

item.title: Abrigo launches agentic AI platform
item.description: AI agents help financial institutions scale operations with greater speed, consistency, and governance

item.title: Warner Bros. Discovery Announces Agentic AI-Powered Advertising Technology Built on AWS, its Preferred Cloud Provider
item.description: WBD's AI-driven advertising innovation is built with AWS to unify the buying experience across linear and digital, giving advertisers the fluidity of one platform while each channel keeps its own essence – with cloud-scale infrastructure and autonomous, intelligent workflows.

item.title: Fox Corporation Names Amazon Web Services its Preferred AI Cloud Provider
item.description: New York, NY and Los Angeles, CA – April 16, 2026 – Fox Corporation (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX; “FOX” or the “Company”) today announced a strategic collaboration with Amazon Web Services (AWS), naming AWS as its preferred AI Cloud provider. The partnership marks a significant step forward in FOX’s ongoing…

item.title: NVIDIA Nemotron Achieves Benchmark-Leading Performance With LangChain Deep Agents Harness
item.description: NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra is offering leading performance at lower cost than top closed models with the largest and most widely adopted AI agent orchestration platform. LangChain tuned its Deep Agents harness for NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra, achieving the highest accuracy among open models, while completing more tasks at hig

item.title: Amazon Supports Weekly Humanitarian Relief Flights to Venezuela in First-of-its-Kind Collaboration
item.description: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) today announced it will support a seven-flight humanitarian air delivery operation into Caracas, Venezuela, in response to the devastating twin earthquakes that struck northern Venezuela on June 24, leaving more than 650,000 people in need of aid.

item.title: Amazon e i suoi partner di vendita donano oltre 600 mila prodotti per un valore di oltre 8 milioni di euro a sostegno delle famiglie in tutta Italia
item.description: Attraverso Amazon Dona,Amazon dà una seconda vita ai prodotti, supportando le comunità più fragili e contribuendo a un’economia più circolare.

item.title: El centro de Amazon Fresh de Barcelona celebra su quinto aniversario con más de 100 personas empleadas
item.description: Amazon Fresh, el servicio de supermercado online de Amazon, opera a través de cinco centros en todo el país para llevar los pedidos a clientes de Barcelona, Madrid, Guadalajara, Valencia, Sevilla y Zaragoza.El centro de operaciones de Barcelona gestiona, de media, 1.500 pedidos diarios con más de…

item.title: How AWS Helps Power Fullpower-AI Sleep Intelligence for Smart Beds Globally
item.description: Fullpower-AI uses AWS to scale high-fidelity sleep and environmental intelligence across connected smart beds, helping advance the future of healthier sleep.

item.title: AI Innovators Adopt NVIDIA Vera — Why Max Single-Threaded CPU at Scale Matters
item.description: Max single-threaded CPUs at scale are a new category of CPUs built for the agentic AI era. Across the creation and deployment of an agentic system, the CPU is on the critical path for reasoning, response time and learning. CPUs are the processor which executes the work the AI model commands: the tool calling, code […]

item.title: NVIDIA and Hugging Face Bring New Models and Frameworks to LeRobot for the Open Robotics Community
item.description: Open source AI has shown how quickly developers can innovate when models, data and tools are shared. Robotics has the same opportunity, but advancements in physical AI development can still be gated by costly and fragmented resources, from large datasets and robot foundation models to simulation, compute and validation

item.title: The Trade Desk Named to Newsweek’s America’s Greatest Workplaces 2026 Media Coverage July 07, 2026
item.description: The Trade Desk takes this issue seriously and is taking steps to address it.

item.title: How Open Models Are Driving AI Research
item.description: Every year, the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) reveals where thousands of AI researchers have decided to put their work. This year’s accepted papers reveal a clear direction: open frontier models and open AI infrastructure have become foundational to how modern AI science gets done. NVIDIA had 74 p

item.title: How Nations Are Deploying AI for Strategic Priorities
item.description: Nations have long invested in domestic infrastructure to advance their economies, protect and use their data, and take advantage of technology opportunities in areas such as transportation, communications, commerce, entertainment and healthcare. AI, the most important technology of our time, is turbocharging innovation

item.title: El centro de Amazon Fresh de Madrid celebra su quinto aniversario con más de 150 personas empleadas
item.description: Amazon Fresh, el servicio de supermercado online de Amazon, opera a través de cinco centros en todo el país para llevar los pedidos a clientes de Madrid, Barcelona, Guadalajara, Valencia, Sevilla y Zaragoza.El centro de operaciones de Madrid gestiona, de media, 1.800 pedidos diarios con más de…

item.title: Münchner Startup bringt mit Amazons Unterstützung nährstoffreiche Milchalternative aus Biertreber auf den Markt
item.description: Circular grain aus München entwickelt mit Tremi eine pflanzliche Milchalternative aus Biertreber. Der Marktstart im Großraum München ist für September geplant. Das von drei Absolventinnen der Technischen Universität München gegründete Startup hat mehr als zwei Jahre an der Produktentwicklung…

item.title: Joyride Through July With 12 Games Coming to GeForce NOW
item.description: Summer is heating up — and GeForce NOW is taking players along for the ride. Start the month with Monopoly: Star Wars Heroes vs. Villains, bringing a galaxy far, far away to the iconic board-game franchise, alongside 12 new games joining the cloud this month. Plus, don’t let the sun set on the biggest GeForce […]

item.title: NVIDIA Unlocks AI Compute at Scale, Inviting Capital Partners to Power the AI Infrastructure Buildout
item.description: As AI moves from model development to production inference, compute demand is accelerating and shifting toward continuously operating AI factories that generate tokens at scale. This shift requires access to large‑scale, multi‑tenant accelerated computing that can come online quickly, stay highly utilized and support t

item.title: Amazon Launches Community Fund, Now Accepting Applications for Projects in Frederick County, Maryland
item.description: Individuals and organizations can apply for funds to support projects that positively impact their community. Learn more and apply.

item.title: NVIDIA and Partners Build in America, for America
item.description: NVIDIA and its partners are investing in American manufacturing, supply chains, energy grids and skilled workforces so the U.S. can produce the infrastructure needed for better healthcare, breakthrough scientific discovery, stronger industrial productivity and global technology leadership.

item.title: ¿Y tú, de quién eres? Gazpacho o Salmorejo
item.description: El gazpacho, la tortilla con cebolla o las patatas bravas, los favoritos de los españoles según la encuesta "La cesta y la mesa: hábitos de compra y preferencias gastronómicas en España" elaborada por Beruby para Amazon.Un 46% de los encuestados considera que la compra online ofrece más opciones y…

item.title: Datadog Acquires Adaptive ML to Accelerate Its Investment in AI Research and Development
item.description: Adaptive ML will join Datadog’s AI lab to build frontier AI infrastructure to address cutting-edge research challenges within observability and security NEW YORK, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today

item.title: University of Utah Launches Secure Research Enclave to Accelerate Competitive Research with Amazon Web Services
item.description: [MEDIA ALERT]Powered by Amazon Web Services, the University of Utah’s new Secure Research Enclave brings secure, scalable cloud computing to complex research involving sensitive data, AI-enabled analysis and NIST, HIPAA, FISMA and CMMC requirements.

item.title: New Pearson and AWS Research: The U.S. Helped Build the AI Economy. The Next Opportunity is Preparing Graduates to Thrive in it.
item.description: HOBOKEN, N.J., [June 30, 2026] — Pearson (FTSE: PSON.L), the world’s lifelong learning company, today released new research with Amazon Web Services (AWS) showing that while the United States leads in AI innovation, there is more opportunity to prepare students with the skills needed to support an AI-ready workforce.

item.title: USF advances national security research, becoming first in Florida to implement new secure cloud infrastructure powered by Amazon Web Services
item.description: The University of South Florida is strengthening its position as a national security innovation hub through a new secure cloud infrastructure that will expand defense and aerospace-focused research, accelerate technology development and prepare students for careers supporting national security.

item.title: AWS Global Startup Trends Report Reveals AI-Native Startups Are Reaching Billion-Dollar Valuations in Half the Time
item.description: [MEDIA ALERT]New study of 3,400+ founders across 20 countries finds that AI-native companies grow at 156% annually with half the staff of their predecessors

item.title: From the Gas Pump to the Grill: Prime Introduces Summer Savings Just in Time for the Fourth of July
item.description: Prime members can save $0.50 per gallon on fuel during the Fourth of July weekend, plus savings on barbecue grocery items like grilling meats under $10, summer produce under $4, and party-size snacks and frozen treats starting at $2.

item.title: Datadog Launches 100+ Capabilities to Help Customers Drive Autonomy and Manage Growing AI and Security Complexity
item.description: New Bits AI, log management and security capabilities give customers the visibility and autonomous operations they need to detect, investigate and resolve issues across the development loop and data lifecycle NEW YORK, June 09, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc., (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading

item.title: Datadog to Present at Upcoming Investor Conference
item.description: NEW YORK, May 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced that management will present at the following investor conferences: The J.P. Morgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference.

item.title: Datadog Announces First Quarter 2026 Financial Results
item.description: First quarter revenue grew 32% year-over-year to $1,006 million Robust growth of larger customers, with about 4,550 $100k+ ARR customers, up from about 3,770 a year ago Launched MCP Server, Bits AI Security Agent, GPU Monitoring, and Experiments for general availability NEW YORK, May 07, 2026

item.title: Datadog for Government Achieves FedRAMP® High Certification
item.description: The certification strengthens Datadog’s commitment and ability to meet the unique needs of federal organizations NEW YORK, May 06, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the monitoring and security platform for cloud applications, today announced it has achieved FedRAMP (Federal

item.title: Datadog Announces GPU Monitoring to Help Businesses Optimize Spend and Performance as They Aim to Scale AI Projects
item.description: The launch of Datadog’s GPU Monitoring helps teams plan capacity, troubleshoot issues quickly, prevent costly failures and avoid wasted spend NEW YORK, April 22, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc., (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced that

item.title: AI Is Hitting Operational Limits as Companies Rush to Scale, Datadog Report Finds
item.description: Nearly 1 in 20 AI requests fail in production as capacity limits become the primary bottleneck to scaling AI reliably NEW YORK, April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As AI adoption accelerates, operational complexity – not model intelligence – is becoming the primary barrier to reliable AI at scale,

item.title: Datadog Announces Date of First Quarter Fiscal Year 2026 Earnings Call
item.description: NEW YORK, April 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ:DDOG), the AI-powered observability and security platform for cloud applications, today announced that it will report its first quarter fiscal year 2026 financial results before the U.S.
